case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ANGEL OCTAVIO PERAZA GARCIA

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/09/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, ANGEL OCTAVIO PERAZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/24/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2019 -CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO JAN-09-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES ADVISED OF THE CONTINUANCE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2020 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ANGEL OCTAVIO PERAZA GARCIA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, ANGEL OCTAVIO PERAZA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
